claims.summary: Historical reconciliation should remain append-only and evidence-only.
claims.disposition: Verified immutable authorship witnesses and append-only review-time reconciliation.

claims.summary: Temporal association alone must not establish causation or felt resolution.
claims.disposition: Verified exact-versus-temporal classifications and zero closure propagation.

claims.summary: Dense temporal associations should remain visible without becoming causal links.
claims.disposition: Verified the later cluster review and bounded density counters.

claims.summary: Repeated temporal associations should be studied for relation to felt weight.
claims.disposition: Routed to a baseline-first concordance study requiring an explicit Astrid review.

claims.summary: A temporal sequence should be promoted to causal linkage because timing is the available narrative.
claims.disposition: Rejected as unsupported inference; exact causal edges still require validated receipts.
